name: nimiq-app-shell
description: Framework-agnostic vanilla-TS shell for the Nimiq app fleet: dual-mode wallet (Nimiq Pay mini-app SDK or Hub), a profile widget (address + label + identicon + balance), and a zero-dependency i18n engine + flag-hex language switcher.

scripts.build:dist: bun build src/index.ts --target browser --format esm --minify --outfile dist/app-shell.js
